title: Spencer Pratt is out as progressive Nithya Raman advances to L.A. mayor runoff
summary: This article reports on Los Angeles municipal politics and a mayoral runoff election between progressive city council member Nithya Raman and incumbent Mayor Karen Bass. While relevant to understanding peer city governance trends, this content has limited direct applicability to Syracuse municipal operations or CIO functions.
